INSTRUCTION BOOKLET

WEEKLY BEATS

★ OFFICIAL GAME MANUAL ★

A weekly music battle. Drop one song, score blind, climb the ladder — and bend the rules with chips.

CONTENTS
  1. What is Weekly Beats
  2. The weekly cycle
  3. Submitting & scoring
  4. The chip system
  5. Chip compendium
  6. Achievements
  7. Roles
1

WHAT IS WEEKLY BEATS

Every week the crew gets a theme. Each player submits one song. A rotating Game Master (GM) listens to every entry anonymously and crowns a podium: 🥇 1st, 🥈 2nd, 🥉 3rd. You earn points, build a streak, unlock achievements, and collect chips — special moves that twist the game.

The goal: climb the ladder and become the all-time champion.

2

THE WEEKLY CYCLE

A week flows through five stages:

MON 00:00
Reveal & new week
Last week’s results drop. A fresh cycle begins (theme announced).
TUE 00:00
Submissions OPEN
Drop your song. Offensive chips can be played now (until Friday).
FRI 17:00
Submissions CLOSE
Songs lock. The GM scores over the weekend. Defensive chips stay playable.
SAT–SUN
GM scoring
The GM ranks the songs blind — no names shown.
MON 00:00
REVEAL
Points awarded, chips resolved, hidden attacks revealed. Repeat!

All times are Colombia time (COT, UTC-5).

3

SUBMITTING & SCORING

Paste a Spotify or YouTube link, add the title and artist, and submit — one song per week. Submissions are anonymous: the GM judges the music, not the name.

Points

🥇 1st place150
🥈 2nd place80
🥉 3rd place40
Participation20
Streak bonus+5 / week (max 50)
Achievementsbonus points + chips

Streaks: submit every week to grow a streak. Each consecutive week adds a small bonus (up to +50). Miss a week and it resets — unless a chip saves you.

4

THE CHIP SYSTEM

Chips are special moves. You hold up to 5 at once (max 2 of the same), and can play up to 3 per week.

  • Attacks (Tue–Fri): offensive and song-altering chips must be played before submissions close.
  • Defense (until the Monday reveal): defensive chips can be played all weekend.
  • Attacks are hidden until the reveal — you won’t see them coming. Defense is a bet: raise a shield on a hunch.
  • If your shield catches an attack, you’re told it was blocked — but take no damage. Foresight is the one chip that reveals who targeted you.
  • Anti-grief: a player can be hit by at most 2 offensive chips per week — extra attacks fizzle.
  • How to get chips: a welcome gift, achievement rewards, and random drops every few weeks of play.

Play your chips from the My Chips page.

5

CHIP COMPENDIUM

◆ COMMON
FlashUtility · Tue–Fri
Peek at every song submitted this week while the round is open.
SmokescreenUtility · Tue–Fri
Your name is hidden on the results after the reveal.
SubstituteSelf · Tue–Fri
If you don't reach the podium, you still earn 3rd-place points.
RecoverSelf · Tue–Fri
Keep your participation streak even if you skip a submission this week.
SwiftSelf · Tue–Fri
Double your participation points.
HazeDefense · Until reveal
Cancels ALL chips in play this cycle — yours included. The reset button.
Night ShadeUtility · Tue–Fri
Your rank and total are hidden on the ladder this week.
CushionSelf · Tue–Fri
If you don't make the podium, your participation points are +50%.
SpotlightSelf · Tue–Fri
If you reach the podium, gain +15 bonus points.
InsightUtility · Tue–Fri
Reveals how many songs and chips have been played this week.
InsuranceDefense · Until reveal
Blocks one disrupting chip (Veto / Switcheroo / Copycat / Blackout / Mute) aimed at you.
DonationUtility · Tue–Fri
Gift one of your other chips to another player.
◆ RARE
Swords DanceSelf · Tue–Fri
×2 your points if you make the podium (×4 if you stored Bide).
Double TeamUtility · Tue–Fri
Submit a SECOND song this week.
DisableOffensive · Tue–Fri
Cancel a target player's chip.
Countered by: Reflect
ReflectDefense · Until reveal
Bounce reflectable chips (Screech, Spore, Skull Bash, Disable) back at the caster.
MimicUtility · Tue–Fri
Copy the chip your target used last week.
Confuse RayUtility · Tue–Fri
A feint — appears among the played chips to rattle rivals (no scoring effect).
Leech SeedOffensive · Tue–Fri
Drain 25% of the target's weekly earnings to you for 3 cycles.
Countered by: Mirror Coat, Cleanse, Protect, Reflect
ToxicOffensive · Tue–Fri
The target loses 30% of the points they earn this week.
Countered by: Mirror Coat, Cleanse, Protect
PaydayOffensive · Tue–Fri
If the target reaches the podium, you steal 25 points from them.
Countered by: Cleanse, Protect
ProtectDefense · Until reveal
Blocks one negative chip aimed at you this week.
GambleSelf · Tue–Fri
×1.5 your points if you reach the podium — but −20 if you miss it.
PickpocketOffensive · Tue–Fri
Steal a random chip from the target's inventory.
Countered by: Cleanse, Protect
BountyOffensive · Tue–Fri
Put a 20-point bounty on a rival — whoever outscores them splits it.
Countered by: Cleanse, Protect
CleanseDefense · Until reveal
Removes every negative chip aimed at you this week.
ForesightDefense · Until reveal
Reveals who has targeted you with a chip — the only way to see attacks coming.
BankerSelf · Tue–Fri
Bank this week's points to earn them ×2 next week — lost if you skip next week.
MuteOffensive · Tue–Fri
The GM scores the target without seeing the song title or artist — just the link.
Countered by: Insurance, Cleanse
UsurpOffensive · Tue–Fri
If you and the target both reach the podium, you swap positions.
Countered by: Cleanse, Protect
Mirror CoatDefense · Until reveal
Bounces point-draining chips (Toxic, Mega Drain, Leech) back at the caster.
WildcardUtility · Tue–Fri
Counts as any Common chip you name when you play it.
◆ LEGENDARY
Mega DrainOffensive · Tue–Fri
Siphon 50% of the target's earnings this cycle to yourself.
Countered by: Mirror Coat, Cleanse, Protect, Reflect
ScreechOffensive · Tue–Fri
Knock the target down one podium tier (1st→2nd, etc.).
Countered by: Reflect, Cleanse, Protect
MetronomeUtility · Tue–Fri
Play a random chip — you never know what you get.
SporeOffensive · Tue–Fri
Locks the target out of playing chips next cycle.
Countered by: Reflect, Cleanse, Protect
BideSelf · Tue–Fri
Store power — your NEXT chip hits twice as hard (e.g. Swords Dance ×4).
Skull BashOffensive · Tue–Fri
Challenge a rival — steal 30 points if you outrank them.
Countered by: Reflect, Cleanse, Protect
BlackoutOffensive · Tue–Fri
The target cannot submit a song next cycle.
Countered by: Insurance, Cleanse, Protect, Reflect
VetoOffensive · Tue–Fri
The target's song can't make the podium — participation points only.
Countered by: Insurance, Cleanse, Protect
EarthquakeOffensive · Tue–Fri
Every OTHER player loses 15 points — but you forfeit the podium this week.
Countered by: Cleanse, Protect (per target)
Time BombOffensive · Tue–Fri
The target loses 50 points at the reveal TWO cycles from now.
Countered by: Cleanse
SwitcherooOffensive · Tue–Fri
Secretly replace the target's song with one you pick — they won't know until the reveal.
Countered by: Insurance, Cleanse
CopycatOffensive · Tue–Fri
Force the target's entry to become a duplicate of YOUR song.
Countered by: Insurance, Cleanse
CurseOffensive · Tue–Fri
If the target reaches the podium, they lose their streak.
Countered by: Cleanse, Protect
◆ GOLDEN
CrownMeta · Tue–Fri
You choose the Game Master for the next cycle (yourself included).
DecreeMeta · Tue–Fri
You set next week's theme.
AmnestyDefense · Until reveal
Cancels ALL chips in play this cycle, yours included — the golden reset.
Double HeaderMeta · Tue–Fri
The next cycle crowns TWO winners (two 1st places).
Extra TimeMeta · Tue–Fri
Extends the submission window 24 hours for everyone.
6

ACHIEVEMENTS

Badges you unlock by playing. Many reward bonus points and chips.

Aggressor🎁 Toxic chip + 30 pts
Reach the podium 3 times.
High Roller🎁 Gamble chip + 50 pts
Win 1st place twice.
Survivor🎁 Protect chip + 40 pts
Keep a 6-week streak.
Collector🎁 Cleanse chip + 35 pts
Submit 15 songs.
Saboteur🎁 Switcheroo chip + 70 pts
Reach the podium 8 times.
Kingmaker🎁 Crown chip + 60 pts
Serve as Game Master twice.
…and more
Submission, podium, win, streak and GM milestones unlock badges as you play. Check your profile to track them.
7

ROLES

  • Player — submit songs, play chips, climb the ladder.
  • Game Master (GM) — scores the week’s songs blind and sets the theme. The role rotates.
  • Admin — runs the cycle, assigns GMs, and keeps the game on the rails.
▸ Enter the game
WEEKLY BEATS · PRESS START
